title: project.md — Touchstone
summary: Technical specification for Touchstone, an on-chain AI credit rating agent for RWA assets on Mantle, covering architecture, contracts, agent pipeline, phasing, and hackathon submission requirements.
scope: ERC-8004 Identity Registry and Reputation Registry integration
Five-dimension deterministic risk scoring (collateral quality, contract risk, oracle integrity, liquidity/stability, governance/custodian)
LLM reasoning step (Claude) for grade synthesis
RWA subjects: USDY, mETH, fBTC, MI4, Ethena USDe
Tech stack: Solidity/Foundry, TypeScript/Node agent, Next.js frontend, IPFS
Mantle Turing Test Hackathon 2026 submission (AI x RWA, AI Alpha & Data, 20 Project Deployment Award, Best UI/UX)
9-day phased build plan with split attention vs Sui Overflow
